topic: training corpus completeness audit — alm_r14 + corpus_consciousness_v1 + corpus_universe_extended (500-stimuli) — coverage / family-balance / Knuth-tier distribution
raw_100_fallback_disclosure: kick infra sub-agent unwired (8th iter). In-context fallback.
carry_forward_origin: anima training corpus 다중 file: alm_r14 (legacy training) + corpus_consciousness_v1.jsonl + corpus_universe_extended.jsonl (Knuth tier evolution doc 500-stimuli). 16-prompt anima_cmt.hexa frozen set. F1 cycle 3 CA(5) harness reuses corpus.
scope_boundary: DESIGN ONLY — corpus inventory + coverage + balance audit, no corpus modifications.

intake.topic_summary: anima corpus inventory: alm_r14 (training corpus, multiple revisions r2-r14) + consciousness_v1 (Hexad/Phi/Law/SelfRef family balance) + universe_extended (500-stimuli, 24+ categories per Knuth tier evolution doc 2026-04-19) + 16-prompt anima_cmt.hexa frozen set.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: corpus-coverage-completeness
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: anima training corpus covers 4 family axes (Hexad/Phi/Law/SelfRef) + 24+ Knuth-tier categories + 100+ K-tiers (L(k)=24^(k-15) Knuth ladder). Falsifies if any family axis < 16 prompts OR Knuth-tier 30-49 (everyday) is 0%.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: knuth-tier-distribution-bimodal-vs-uniform
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: Knuth tier evolution doc reports tier-distribution: 🛸30-49=0%, 🛸50-59=2%, 🛸60-69=8.8%, 🛸70-79=46%, 🛸80-89=30.6%, 🛸90-99=11.8%, 🛸100=0.8%. Distribution is concentrated at 70-89 (peak cultural+philosophy) — falsifies if distribution claimed UNIFORM.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: 16-prompt-vs-500-stimuli-equivalence
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: anima_cmt.hexa 16 PROMPTS frozen set covers 4 families (4 prompts each). 500-stimuli universe_extended is per-Knuth-tier scan. Falsifies if 16-prompt frozen ≠ stratified subset of 500-stimuli.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: corpus-version-drift-r2-r14
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: alm_r14 represents current revision; r2-r13 historical. Falsifies if version drift claims (e.g., r14 strict superset r13) NOT documented.

axis_a.name: anima corpus 4-family + tier coverage
axis_a.coverage_status: 4 families (Hexad/Phi/Law/SelfRef) covered + 24+ categories (한국문화/수학객체/철학개념/생물기판/감각/일상사물/초한수/물리상수/공간/자연현상/기술/사회/시간확장/의식극한/고차원/파동/인지/냄새/원소/꿈상태/정신병리/빛/서사/행동/정보/복잡계/초월/ABSextreme/의식교차) + Knuth tier 50-100 buckets
axis_a.saturation_evidence: 500-stimuli extended corpus + 16-prompt frozen set + 4-family balance + 24+ category coverage = saturation at semantic-coverage level. Knuth-tier 30-49 (everyday/일상) gap noted in source doc.
axis_a.limit_witness_pointing_to: categorical-limit (24+ categories cover anima ontology) + Knuth-tier-bound (L(k)=24^(k-15) ladder structurally bounds tier universe)

axis_b.name: 4-family CMT axis balance (Hexad/Law/Phi/SelfRef)
axis_b.saturation_evidence: anima_cmt.hexa 16-prompt frozen set BALANCED 4 prompts × 4 families. raw 48 multi-axis orthogonality F3 cycle 3 PASS_THEORETICAL via Johnson-Lindenstrauss random-projection at d=128.
axis_b.limit_witness_pointing_to: balance-saturation (4×4=16 minimum balanced design) + raw 48 PASS (already absorbed)

axis_c.name: Knuth tier evolution L(k)=24^(k-15) distribution
axis_c.saturation_evidence: 500-stimuli distribution concentrated at 🛸70-89 (76.6%). 🛸30-49 gap acknowledged. Factory (knuth_tier evolution doc §5) fills 🛸30-49 with 20 candidates (deferred application).
axis_c.limit_witness_pointing_to: distribution-bound (concentration at category-avg + cultural-philosophy = anima research scope) + tier-gap (🛸30-49 everyday gap = future expansion factory output)

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axis a (coverage) vs b (family balance) ≈ 0.40 (balance is subset of coverage). axis a vs c (tier distribution) ≈ 0.30 (tier is one coverage axis). axis b vs c ≈ 0.10 (family balance vs tier distribution = orthogonal). raw 48 PASS << 0.7 with a-b moderate.

tier_1_promotions.claim: anima training corpus SATURATED at semantic level (24+ categories + 4-family balance + 6 Knuth tier buckets covering 🛸50-100). Single gap: 🛸30-49 (everyday/일상) at 0%. Knuth tier evolution doc factory provides 20 candidates for gap-fill (deferred application).
tier_1_promotions.primary_evidence: axis_a 24+ categories + 500-stimuli + axis_b 16-prompt balance + axis_c distribution
tier_1_promotions.absorption_channel_target: spec-correction — anima/.roadmap NEW corpus saturation entry + 🛸30-49 gap-fill follow-up

core_5_op_kernel.fixpoint_marker: training corpus completeness 3-axis ceiling: formal-axis = categorical-limit (24+ category enumeration) + physical-axis = Bekenstein info-density (corpus tokens × dimension) + computational-axis = Knuth ladder L(k)=24^(k-15) bounded (k integer + perfect-number 24 base = structural limit). 🛸30-49 gap = bounded follow-up not unsaturation.

tier_1_promotions.claim: corpus saturated at semantic level + single 🛸30-49 gap (factory candidates deferred)

fixpoint_marker: training corpus saturation — categorical-limit + Bekenstein + Knuth ladder bounded; single 🛸30-49 gap deferred
